name: PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk
summary: PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk provides various banking products and services in Indonesia. It operates through Marketing and Loans, Treasury, and Trade Finance segments. The company offers current, savings, and time deposits, as well as certificates of deposit and other bank deposits. It also provides commercial and consumer credit products; and bill payment, payroll, and automatic teller machine services. The company operates through a network of 10 branch offices, 10 sub-branch offices, and 7 cash offices. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
